summary: Frontend testing for auth state bug fix and date picker implementation. Most tests PASSED. One BUG found: AddLectureModal date picker not rendering as HTML input type=date.

ui_bugs.issue: Date picker NOT rendering as HTML input type=date - showing TextInput with placeholder 'YYYY-MM-DD' instead. Platform.OS === 'web' check returning false or HTML input not rendering correctly inside React Native Modal portal.
React infinite loop: 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error in console when modal opens. Likely caused by useEffect dependency array issue.
Console spam: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>' - appears hundreds of times when AddLectureModal opens

test_results.course_lectures_buttons_visible: PASS - All 3 buttons (إضافة, توليد, تحديد) visible
test_results.no_debug_text: PASS - No 'User: admin | canManage:' debug text found
test_results.generate_modal_date_pickers: PASS - 2 date pickers (input type=date) found for start/end dates
test_results.add_lecture_modal_date_picker: FAIL - 0 date pickers found, showing TextInput instead
test_results.general_settings_date_pickers: COULD NOT VERIFY - Need to open semester modal
test_results.schedule_page_date_pickers: N/A - Dates already configured, showing green info bar

action_items: FIX AddLectureModal.tsx: The Platform.OS === 'web' conditional is not rendering the HTML <input type='date'> correctly. Compare with working implementation in course-lectures.tsx Generate modal. The issue may be related to rendering raw HTML inside React Native Modal component.
FIX infinite loop bug in AddLectureModal: 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error - check useEffect dependencies on lines 105-117
OPTIONAL: Fix 'Unexpected text node' warnings - likely whitespace/newline characters between JSX elements
critical_code_review_comments: AddLectureModal.tsx line 246-276: Platform.OS === 'web' conditional identical to course-lectures.tsx but not working - investigate if Modal portal affects Platform detection or HTML rendering
AddLectureModal.tsx useEffect on line 105-117: May have circular dependency causing infinite re-renders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth state bug on course-lectures.tsx has been FIXED - buttons are now visible. The Generate modal date pickers work correctly (type=date). However, AddLectureModal.tsx date picker is NOT working - it renders as TextInput instead of HTML date input. The code at line 246 uses identical Platform.OS === 'web' check but somehow renders the wrong branch. Also has 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React error when modal opens.
rca_of_the_issue: The AddLectureModal component uses React Native's <Modal> component which creates a portal. When raw HTML <input> elements are rendered inside this portal, they may not render correctly due to React Native Web's DOM reconciliation. The Platform.OS check IS returning 'web' (confirmed in console logs), but the HTML input is either not being rendered or is being transformed. Compare: Generate modal in course-lectures.tsx renders inline without <Modal> wrapper and works. AddLectureModal uses <Modal> wrapper and fails.
